side_effects.description: Hard lumps at injection site on stomach (5 lumps creating rippled dimpled effect); lumps persisted for over a month after site rotation
Stinging/pain at injection site (both peptides described as spicy); pain present but bearable at glute injection site

protocol_notes: Used for approximately 1 month; initially injected in stomach, then rotated to glute (butt cheek) after developing lumps; reports high pain tolerance; rotates injection sites by ~2cm; has not noticed much subjective benefit from either peptide; plans to use heat, massage, and castor oil packs to address lumps; considering pH testing and better BAC water quality
